option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
package com.example.readerapp.ui.reader
import com.example.readerapp.data.local.ReaderSettings
data class ReaderUiState( val bookTitle: String = "", val chapters: List<String> = emptyList(), val pages: List<String> = emptyList(), val coverImage: ByteArray? = null, val currentChapterIndex: Int = 0, val progress: Float = 0f, val isHudVisible: Boolean = true, val settings: ReaderSettings = ReaderSettings(), val isLoading: Boolean = false ) { override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean { if (this === other) return true if (javaClass != other?.javaClass) return false
other as ReaderUiState
if (bookTitle != other.bookTitle) return false if (chapters != other.chapters) return false if (pages != other.pages) return false if (coverImage != null) { if (other.coverImage == null) return false if (!coverImage.contentEquals(other.coverImage)) return false } else if (other.coverImage != null) return false if (currentChapterIndex != other.currentChapterIndex) return false if (progress != other.progress) return false if (isHudVisible != other.isHudVisible) return false if (settings != other.settings) return false if (isLoading != other.isLoading) return false
return true }
override fun hashCode(): Int { var result = bookTitle.hashCode() result = 31 * result + chapters.hashCode() result = 31 * result + pages.hashCode() result = 31 * result + (coverImage?.contentHashCode() ?: 0) result = 31 * result + currentChapterIndex result = 31 * result + progress.hashCode() result = 31 * result + isHudVisible.hashCode() result = 31 * result + settings.hashCode() result = 31 * result + isLoading.hashCode() return result } }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
package com.example.readerapp.ui.reader
import com.example.readerapp.data.local.ReaderSettings import com.example.readerapp.data.model.EpubResource
data class ReaderUiState( val bookTitle: String = "", val chapters: List<String> = emptyList(), val pages: List<String> = emptyList(), val coverImage: ByteArray? = null, val chapterHrefs: List<String> = emptyList(), val resources: Map<String, EpubResource> = emptyMap(), val currentChapterIndex: Int = 0, val progress: Float = 0f, val isHudVisible: Boolean = true, val settings: ReaderSettings = ReaderSettings(), val isLoading: Boolean = false ) { override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean { if (this === other) return true if (javaClass != other?.javaClass) return false
other as ReaderUiState
if (bookTitle != other.bookTitle) return false if (chapters != other.chapters) return false if (pages != other.pages) return false if (coverImage != null) { if (other.coverImage == null) return false if (!coverImage.contentEquals(other.coverImage)) return false } else if (other.coverImage != null) return false if (chapterHrefs != other.chapterHrefs) return false if (resources != other.resources) return false if (currentChapterIndex != other.currentChapterIndex) return false if (progress != other.progress) return false if (isHudVisible != other.isHudVisible) return false if (settings != other.settings) return false if (isLoading != other.isLoading) return false
return true }
override fun hashCode(): Int { var result = bookTitle.hashCode() result = 31 * result + chapters.hashCode() result = 31 * result + pages.hashCode() result = 31 * result + (coverImage?.contentHashCode() ?: 0) result = 31 * result + chapterHrefs.hashCode() result = 31 * result + resources.hashCode() result = 31 * result + currentChapterIndex result = 31 * result + progress.hashCode() result = 31 * result + isHudVisible.hashCode() result = 31 * result + settings.hashCode() result = 31 * result + isLoading.hashCode() return result } }
